name: athena
description: Agent-host plugins and skills imported by Claude Code / Codex / Pi.

interface.shortDescription: Repository auditing, agent orchestration, and workflow skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Athena provides Codex skills for repository analysis, strict PR review, Myrmidon swarm orchestration, test-driven development, systematic debugging, branch completion, worktree hygiene, and reusable Python project modernization workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Athena to route this task to the right Codex skill.
